hero.desc: I aim to build software that feels simple, even when there's complexity underneath.

about.title: About
about.intro1: I like building products that work well for those who use them and are also sustainable for those who maintain them.
about.intro2: My journey started closer to the frontend, but over time I became increasingly involved in decisions that connect experience, product, and implementation.
about.intro3: Today I especially enjoy understanding problems, finding points of improvement, and turning complex processes into simpler, clearer experiences.

projects.title: Projects
projects.pokeintro: Individual academic project from Soy Henry bootcamp. SPA where you can view different Pokémon types, filter, sort, and create new ones.
projects.pokeintro2: This application was developed entirely by me, both frontend and backend, consuming the PokéAPI.
projects.MeliCLoneIntro: Project based on MercadoLibre's challenge. A clone of the main page consuming their API for search and item details.
projects.MeliCLone2: Includes item search with result filtering, item details, and user questions.
projects.SmartInvestIntro: A platform for crypto news, listings, trends, and coin details — all in one place.
projects.SmartInvestIntro2: Features interactive charts across time periods using CoinGecko API and a news API.
projects.UnderGraffIntro: Women's fashion store project with categorized product browsing.
projects.UnderGraffIntro2: Users can browse products and add favorites to a personalized shopping cart.
projects.GitAppIntro: Web app consuming the GitHub API to list users and their repositories.
projects.GitAppIntro2: Built with React, Tailwind CSS, and Express.js with link-header pagination.
projects.weatherAppintro: SPA to search and display weather data for cities worldwide.
projects.weatherAppintro2: Consumes OpenWeatherMap API with detailed weather information.
projects.heanrybankintro: Academic group project — a virtual mobile wallet for deposits, transfers, and crypto trading.
projects.heanrybankintro2: I worked on the backend development for this project.
projects.ChallengeLogin: Role-based authentication challenge with admin/user roles and client CRUD.
projects.ChallengeLogin2: Includes filtering (by name, age range), sorting, and JWT-based security.

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.desc: Open to collaborating on projects, freelance inquiries, or just connecting.
